pageDesc: Control how we select vendors for your work orders
title: Match Weight Preferences
description: Adjust the importance of each factor when matching you with vendors. Weights must add up to 100%.
proximityExplain: Proximity: Higher weight favors vendors closer to your property
ratingExplain: Rating: Higher weight favors vendors with better reviews and ratings
availabilityExplain: Availability: Higher weight favors vendors with open schedules
responseExplain: Response Time: Higher weight favors vendors who respond quickly
priceExplain: Price: Higher weight favors vendors with competitive pricing
